/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/UNOPlusPlus.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UNOPlusPlus.dir/Menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UNOPlusPlus.dir/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UNOPlusPlus.dir/Game.cpp.o -o UNOPlusPlus  -Wl,-rpath,/home/stud1/GitHub/Programming-C/lab13_CMake_Make/UNOPlusPlus/CMake/cmake-build-debug/_deps/sfml-build/lib _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1
